signals.headline: US and Iran Reach 2-Week Ceasefire Ahead of Trump's Deadline | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US and Iran Reach 2-Week Ceasefire Ahead of Trump's Deadline | YES | HIGH confidence**

President Trump announced Tuesday on Truth Social a **2-week ceasefire** with Iran, conditional on Iran providing a "COMPLETE, IMMEDIATE, and SAFE OPENING" of the Strait of Hormuz, while Pakistan-mediated negotiations continue[1][2]. signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 CPI | Inflation Rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 CPI | Inflation Rose to 2.2% | HIGH confidence**
Annual inflation increased to 2.2% in March 2026, up from 2.0% in February, though below the 2.4% market forecast.[1] This moves above the Bank of Korea's 2% target and represents the first increase in two months.

signals.headline: Germany March 2026 CPI | Inflation Accelerated to 2
signals.raw:
Germany March 2026 CPI | Inflation Accelerated to 2.7% | HIGH confidence**
Germany's annual inflation climbed to 2.7% in March 2026 from 1.9% in February, marking the highest level since January 2024, driven primarily by energy price surges.[3]

signals.headline: Bank of Korea Rate Decision (April 10) | Held at 2
signals.raw:
Bank of Korea Rate Decision (April 10) | Held at 2.5% | HIGH confidence**
The BoK maintained its policy rate steady and raised its 2026 inflation outlook to 2.2% from 2.1%, citing geopolitical tensions and oil price volatility.[1][2]
